overall.description: A large bird of prey flies through a misty mountain river valley in this game engine footage. The camera follows closely behind as the bird navigates between cliffs, over water, and through dense fog. The atmosphere is serene yet mysterious with low visibility and cool, desaturated colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty river valley with forested banks and rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: gliding smoothly over the river surface following the winding valley path with gentle wing beats

entered.detail: wide river flowing through the valley with visible current and reflections
steep rock face rising from the riverbank with patches of vegetation
sloped riverbank covered with coniferous trees fading into fog
tall mountain cliff barely visible through the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a misty river valley. The bird glides smoothly over the water between forested banks and rocky cliffs. The fog creates a muted, mysterious atmosphere with limited visibility into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep vertical rock walls

events.description: valley narrows dramatically into a steep-walled canyon with cliffs rising on both sides
bird banks sharply left to navigate a bend in the canyon

agents.ego_description: banking left and right to navigate the tight, winding canyon passage while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: vertical rock wall rising immediately beside the flight path with rough texture
sheer cliff face on the right side creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The bird enters a narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls closing in on both sides. The camera follows as the bird banks sharply to navigate the winding waterway. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the towering canyon walls above.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river section with tall pines growing close to water

events.description: bird flies extremely close to pine tree branches on the left, nearly colliding with foliage

agents.ego_description: weaving between tall pine trees growing close to the water's edge, adjusting altitude to avoid branches

entered.detail: tall coniferous trees with dense branches extending over the river
large boulders and rocks visible just below the water surface

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the bird enters a densely forested area where tall pines grow close to the river. The camera captures a near-miss as the bird brushes past tree branches. Large rocks become visible in the shallow water below as the bird maneuvers through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with rocky shores and gravel banks

events.description: exiting dense forest back into open valley with visible gravel shores and scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: gliding low over shallow river rapids and rocky outcrops, maintaining steady forward momentum

entered.detail: rocky shoreline with pebbles and small stones along the water edge
large boulders and rock formations emerging from the hillside

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider river valley with gravel banks and rocky outcrops. The bird flies low over the shallow water, navigating between visible rocks. The forest recedes into the background as the bird continues its journey through the misty landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a misty river valley that gradually tightens into a narrow, towering canyon. It begins with a wide view of the bird soaring over open water between forested banks and rocky cliffs, where a dense fog creates a muted and mysterious atmosphere. As the bird continues forward, the expansive valley begins to contract, drawing the camera toward a restrictive passage of steep rock walls. The scene then shifts as the bird banks sharply to navigate the winding waterway, with the open sky becoming obscured by the encroaching heights of the canyon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the bird exits a narrow canyon and glides from a dense forest into a wide, open river valley. It begins by weaving through a thick grove of tall pines, where the camera captures the bird brushing past overhanging branches. As the bird maneuvers through the trees, the view shifts downward to reveal large rocks scattered across the shallow water below. The scene then expands as the forest recedes into the background, opening up into a broader landscape of gravel banks and rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera tracks the bird flying low over the shimmering water, navigating between stones within the vast, misty valley.
